ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the farmer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the farmer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farmer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the farmer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the farmer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the farmer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the farmer's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the farmer's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the farm */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer who owns the farm */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the farm (e.g., mother site, satellite site) */,
  "acreage" TEXT /* Size of the farm in acres */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the farm was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the farm */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the farm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the farm's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the farm's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm related to the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., planting, harvesting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_activities_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm that owns the inventory */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the inventory (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., fruit, vegetable) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm that made the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the sale (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, administrator, cooperative staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_farms" (
  "user_farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-farm relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the farm (e.g., owner, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-farm relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-farm relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_farms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_farms_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm related to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meeting, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_events_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who attended the event */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee in the event (e.g., speaker, participant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES farm_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who sent the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the message */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date when the message was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
